title: Show off your fun boards
excerpt:

posts.author: Marit (Marit Balledux)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have been recently implementing monday.com and we are on the verge of introducing the rest of the team to the tool.

Part of the introduction will be showing the fun things monday.com can be used for. So we looked online for fun examples of boards, but unfortunately no search results showed up. Therefore we got creative ourselves and made some some fun boards.

  • a scavenger hunt inside monday.
  • a gif batlle
  • funny teammeeting statistics (late, distracted, talking while on mute)
  • ticktacktoe
  • four in a row
  • dilemmas on tuesday

I will post images of those later once i get acces to my desktop again. But for now I just really wantes to create this topic and see what other creative, fun-loving monday users have been creating. So please share!

posts.author: silverspeaks (Silver)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I’m looking for scavenger Hunt inspo, if you have any!
I created a Tic-tac-toe games for my team, but need something more interactive to get them in the tool!
